---
name: Good first issue
about: A small, well-scoped task suitable for first-time contributors (maintainers use this to seed newcomer tasks)
title: "[Good first issue] "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Task

A clear, one-paragraph description of the small change to make.

## Where

- File(s):
- Section / heading:

## What good looks like

- [ ] Follows the entry format `- [Name](https://example.com/) - Description.`
- [ ] Uses an official or stable link (no mirrors or shorteners).
- [ ] Concise, non-promotional description ending with a period.
- [ ] Internal relative links still resolve (`python3 scripts/check_internal_links.py`).

## Helpful context

- New contributors: see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the "Good First Contributions" section.
- Keep the scope to **one item per pull request** so review is quick.
- Comment here to claim the task before you start, so two people don't duplicate work.
